pokemon:copperajah.name: Copperajah
pokemon:copperajah.summary: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.
They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder.

pokemon:cufant.name: Cufant
pokemon:cufant.summary: If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.
It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color.
